about.title: About the Teacher
about.paragraph1: José Pereira is a guitarist, director, and teacher with over 30 years of experience. He has taught children, teenagers, adults, and seniors, helping each student learn at their own pace while enjoying the music they love.
about.paragraph2: He offers lessons in English, French, and Spanish, and teaches a wide variety of styles: Latin American, pop, classical, jazz, and Catholic music. José also specializes in the Suzuki Method and score reading.

card1.title: Guitar Lessons
card1.text: Learn classical, pop, jazz, Latin American, and Catholic music. Personalized lessons for all ages.

card2.title: Ukulele Lessons
card2.text: Fun and engaging ukulele lessons for beginners and intermediate students.

card3.title: Levels & Methods
card3.text: Beginner, intermediate, and advanced levels. Suzuki Method, score reading, technique development.

plan1.title: Single Lesson
plan1.text: 1 hour lesson. Perfect for beginners or trial sessions.

plan2.title: Monthly Pack
plan2.text: 4 lessons per month. Save $20. Most popular option.

plan3.title: Premium Pack
plan3.text: 8 lessons per month. Save $60. Best value.

v1.title: Warm-up Session
v1.text: A warm-up session demonstrating major scales and clean technique.

v2.title: Nonsuch – Suzuki Book 3
v2.text: Performance of “Nonsuch,” a Renaissance piece included in Suzuki Guitar Book 3.

v3.title: Magdalena – Guitar Performance
v3.text: A beautiful interpretation of “Magdalena” showcasing expressive guitar technique.
